specific_mechanism: Macrotermes mounds maintain ±1°C internal temperature via passive ventilation networks driven by stack-effect convection between buried fungus gardens and surface chimneys
llm_application: LLM cooling-style activation regulation via passive routing networks: 'stack-effect' = gradient flow from high-loss layers to low-loss layers cools high-activation circuits without explicit normalization.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes thermoacoustics phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
